title: Verify lifecycle parity across CLI, MCP, and dashboard
description: Integration gate for the independently implemented CLI, MCP, and dashboard lifecycle surfaces. Prove that all three remain thin wrappers over the same core readiness, resolution, recovery, and mutation contracts and that equivalent operations produce equivalent canonical effects.
acceptance: CLI, MCP, and dashboard expose the agreed task and issue lifecycle operations as thin wrappers over core functions.
Parity tests show equivalent canonical JSON, events, timestamps, and diagnostic codes for the same operation through CLI, MCP, and dashboard.
Parity tests cover claim-dependent transitions, recovery diagnostics, missing ledgers, unmet dependencies, duplicates, reopen, and issue close.
No CLI, MCP, dashboard route, or client writes canonical JSON directly.
notes: This is an integration gate, not the implementation container for all surfaces. Keep fixes in shared core or the owning surface task and use this task for parity gaps only.
